desc: Conducted Proof of Concept (PoC) and product presentations to clients. Analyzed customer problems and proposed effective, customized solutions. Led a small team throughout the project lifecycle and collaboration.

Developed applications using Low-Code platforms and traditional development methods. Built and delivered solutions addressing specific customer challenges. Performed preventive and corrective maintenance on existing systems.
Developed internal applications for business cases. Built both frontend and backend applications. Maintained internal tools and delivered them to internal users.
Taught 40 students in Web Programming using PHP and Laravel. Guided students in Android development using Java and Android Studio. Explained OOP concepts for both web and mobile development.
